Dialog.name: SYS_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A portion of your existing save data can be carried over when starting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}By carrying over save data, you'll be able to use any costumes you've previously obtained, as well as your Persona Compendium.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Note that your Persona Compendium data won't be able to be used on the highest difficulty, {f 0 1 2}Heartless{f 0 1 27}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Furthermore, you will not be able to carry over save data later or redo the carryover using a different save.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Starting new game with save data carried over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 1 4 1}Your save data will not be carried over.[n]{f 1 5 0}Proceed?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Episode Aigis -The Answer- takes place after the events of Persona 3 Reload.[n]{f 1 5 0}It is recommended to reach its conclusion before continuing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Episode Aigis -The Answer- takes place after the events of Persona 3 Reload.[n]{f 1 5 0}It is recommended to reach its conclusion before continuing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There were no costumes to carry over.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Save data cannot be carried over from the network slot. If you wish to carry over this data, please save it to a regular slot.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Save data cannot be carried over from the network slot. If you wish to carry over this data, please save it to a regular slot.[n]{f 1 1}
